HGSS.419.0066:
You have cleared your seventh battle!
Congratulations!\f
You have earned BP as your prize!\f
HGSS.419.0069:
We will return any items we were holding
for you.\f
HGSS.419.0070:
Saving...
Don’t turn off the power.
HGSS.419.0076:
Congratulations, Trainer!\f
In recognition of your outstanding
skill, our Frontier Brain is demanding\r
a match with you.\f
So, your next match is against the
Arcade Star; no ifs or buts!\f
Are you ready?\f
HGSS.419.0077:
Dahlia: No need to worry. ♫
Let chance do what it does.\f
Like surprises from the game board,
life goes through twists and turns.\f
No need to worry. ♫
Things will go as they will.\f
But, enough of that.
I know one thing for certain.\f
You have arrived here not merely
because you were lucky.\f
Let us not waste any time.
I wish to test your skills myself!\f
HGSS.419.0078:
Dahlia: No need to worry. ♫
Let chance do what it does.\f
Like surprises from the game board,
life goes through twists and turns.\f
No need to worry. ♫
Things will go as they will.\f
But, enough of that.
You are proving yourself incredible.\f
Are you incredible because you are so
lucky you shrug off bad luck entirely?\f
Or, are you so incredibly talented to
not be swayed by luck, good or bad?\f
I wish to see for myself what brought
you to me today!\f
HGSS.419.0079:
Dahlia: How fabulous of you!\f
Your love of Pokémon shone through,
and, in turn, your Pokémon believed\r
in you.\f
That is why you handled everything
thrown your way splendidly.\f
A most wonderful victory it was!\f
HGSS.419.0080:
Dahlia: Truly, it was so very fabulous
of all of you!\f
Bad luck, you cast aside, and good
luck, you netted.\f
That you did so is evidence of your
abilities.\f
By defeating me, Dahlia, you have
proven your mastery brilliantly!\f
I am sincerely happy for having this
battle against you!\f
